title: bidens aristosa
intro: Bidens aristosa, also known as Tickseed, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and fern-like foliage. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Bidens aristosa include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and holistic healing practices.
